summary_en: ¥42/share total for FY3/27 (¥22 ordinary + ¥20 commemorative), vs. ¥21/share in FY3/26. Commemorative dividend marks 20th anniversary of Commerce One Holdings and 25th anniversary of subsidiary Softel.
title_en: Notice Regarding FY3/27 Dividend Forecast (Implementation of Commemorative Dividend)
translation_en_brief: Commerce One Holdings announced a dividend increase for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2027. The total per-share dividend is set at ¥42, comprised of ¥22 in ordinary dividend and ¥20 in commemorative dividend. This represents an increase from ¥21 per share in FY3/26. The commemorative dividend has been implemented to express gratitude to shareholders on the occasion of the company's 20th anniversary (August 2026) and the 25th anniversary of its subsidiary Softel. The mid-year dividend (payable at the second quarter end) is ¥21 per share (¥11 ordinary + ¥10 commemorative), and the year-end dividend is also ¥21 per share with the same composition. Final approval of the mid-year and year-end dividends is scheduled for November 2026 and May 2027 board meetings, respectively.
